author: symunona
description: Filter, export notes from your vault using metadata into a customizable new structure.
name: Bulk Exporter

releases.author: symunona
releases.description:
Addressed 
#12 
#13
#17
releases.name: Wikilink bugfix, multiline query, some doc cleanup

releases.author: symunona
releases.description: #10 fix Work on windows too!
releases.name: Open Output Folder

releases.author: symunona
releases.description:
- #11 Integrated diff view into the debug modal
- Renamed and Flipped the "Preserve Wiki Links" toggle to "Convert Wiki Links" as it's more logical to have positive 
- #9 Added toggle for preserving wiki links as is - for quartz export.
releases.name: Diff export, Wiki Link attachments

releases.author: symunona
releases.description:
You can now opt to preserve original asset names, and not append their hash.
Fixed keeping wiki links for attachments. #9 
Fixed links to local non-markdown files: now they're handled as attachments, and saved such as!

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/symunona/obsidian-bulk-exporter/compare/2.0.10...2.0.11
releases.name: Attachment Refinement

releases.author: symunona
releases.description: Bugfix: apply proper link transformation settings to every replace/remove scenario. #8
releases.name: Bugfix - Link replacer

releases.author: symunona
releases.description:
- Added toggle to keep links that are private and/or exported via another rule set.
- Default is still to autoremove, but now it can be configured.
- Fixed bug on boot.
releases.name: Option to Keep Private and Not Found links

releases.author: symunona
releases.description: Wikilink images were not working.
releases.name: Wikilink Images Bugfix

releases.author: symunona
releases.description: In the target folder now you can preserve some files/folders when choosing to clean it.
releases.name: Ignore Pattern for Emptying target folder

releases.author: symunona
releases.description:
Bug fixes:
- Windows attachments were broken #6 
- Toggle to preserve wiki links #3  #5 
- Toggle to normalize local link urls with spaces #3
releases.name: Windows and Link Space Support

releases.author: symunona
releases.description: Before, asset file names did not get normalized, spaces were left in file names. This is unsafe, and can lead to some md parsers to bail, so I now normalize every filename exported with the generic normalizer function.
releases.name: Normalize Asset File Names

releases.author: symunona
releases.description:
!!! Breaking change !!!

If you have been using slug, you may have realized that filenames get normalized skipping spaces. However when there was something like `test -- something` it would get normalized to `test----something`. Instead, now any time there is a situation like this, it'll get normalized to one dash. In the above case, it'd be `test-something`.

Also, fixed a minor bug: on the preview, the draft indicator now works properly.
releases.name: Normalize slug file name

releases.author: symunona
releases.description: Correctly parse `[[link]]` and `[[link|text]]` format links.
releases.name: Added WikiLink support

releases.author: symunona
releases.description:
Now you can create multiple export targets with different queries, different settings.

Instead of a `draft` field, I introduced a `published` field as it felt more convenient: 
When you draft a note, it's easy to forget to add an extra field to make it a draft.

Added nice debug stats in the indicators:
- bug icon, if the script removed links, or could not find attachments
- all the links that are in the file, external, internal
- all the internal links and attachments and what and where the files went

Wrote some unit tests, to make sure 
- all the links are found and replaced properly and 
- old settings are imported properly.
releases.name: Multi Output Support

releases.author: symunona
releases.description: Refresh did not clean up after itself.
releases.name: Hotfix - Refresh Button

releases.author: symunona
releases.description:
- Pop up log on error
- Customizable meta header row
  - change the order
  - select what to display
- remember which groups were open on refresh
- separated stderr and stdout logging in runner
  - errors/warnings in one group
  - all log another container
releases.name: Customizable header row and comfort features

releases.author: symunona
releases.description:
- set a draft field (boolean) for not exporting certain notes but show them in the preview
- proper indication of drafts in the preview
- show PUBLISHED/DRAFTS in the export preview
releases.name: Draft Handling and Preview enhancements

releases.author: symunona
releases.description: Better indicate when the export failed, e.g. shell script returned an error.
releases.name: Loading Indicator on Export Button

releases.author: symunona
releases.description:
Shell script output is now grouped! Counting output lines.
Export Button now indicates loading.
releases.name: Better logging shell scripts

releases.author: symunona
releases.description:
- use metakey `copy` to add glob patterns to copy over to the export dir
- logging is very nice and detailed now, collapsed output folders and output file stats by default for easier debugging
- shell script runner after export is done!
releases.name: globs, logging, shell runner

releases.author: symunona
releases.description:
Fixed a few things:
- using official API everywhere where possible
- not using global this.app anywhere
- cleaned style sheets, scoped every rule used
- all styles are in CSS instead of JS (where applicable)
- settings cleaning
- added a lot of documentation.
releases.name: Initial Code Reviewed Release

releases.author: symunona
releases.description: It should work now.
releases.name: First Release
